rationale: Educ. Code §21.206 governs teacher contract renewal/nonrenewal notice procedures. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or school funding mechanics.
quote: The board's failure to give the notice required by Subsection (a) within the time specified constitutes an election to employ the teacher in the same professional capacity for the following school year.
_note: No conflict. Rule concerns teacher contract notice; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Unrelated provisions.
